label: Air pollution regulating
subtitle: Estimated value of pollution removal by natural habitats (£ millions, 2024 prices)
description: This indicator shows the contribution of natural habitats in removing harmful pollutants from the atmosphere (official statistics in development), in the United Kingdom, for 2005 to 2024.
caveats:
This data includes all pollutants and all habitats.

Please refer to the [UK natural capital accounts quality and methods guide](https://www.ons.gov.uk/economy/environmentalaccounts/methodologies/uknaturalcapitalaccountsqualityandmethodsguide) for more information.
